race.comment: BATOKA CHIEF (1) hasn't been a factor at his past two, but they've been in much tougher races than this. Last time he was in 56 grade he was smashed in betting (started $1.65) and found only one better. That's his level and this looks well within his grasp, despite the tricky draw. HOTINHERRE (6) hasn't been able to break through for an extended period, the latest effort a fourth over 1717m at Sale, but looks perfectly placed here and should be at peak fitness now. TAUPO TIGER (3) has been mixing his form and didn't fare particularly well at the draw, but is hard to ignore off the good last-start performance at this track. MAKUSHA (2) disappointed last start when out of the placings over 2012m at Kilmore, beaten 9 lengths. Looks well placed so expect a big run this time. LEICA TROOPER (9) returned to winning last time in a race that contained a number of rivals here, which means he warrants consideration.
